title: Change of British High Commissioner to Malawi: Leigh Stubblefield
body: "Ms Leigh Stubblefield has been appointed British High Commissioner to the Republic of Malawi in succession to Ms Fiona Ritchie, who will be transferring to another Diplomatic Service appointment. Ms Stubblefield will take up her appointment during November 2025.  Curriculum vitae           Full name:  Leigh Kathryn Stubblefield     Year Role     2023 to 2025  Nairobi, Deputy High Commissioner and Development Director   2020 to 2023  HMG Stabilisation Unit, Deputy Director – merged into new FCDO Conflict Directorate in February 2021   2018 to 2020  DFID, Head, Conflict, Security and Justice Group   2015 to 2018  DFID Team Leader, Migration and Modern Slavery Department   2013 to 2015  DFID, Deputy Head, Governance and Open Societies Department   2012 to 2013  DFID, Team Leader, Growth and Resilience Department   2010 to 2012  Maputo, Team Leader, Growth and Rural Development   2006 to 2010  Nairobi and Mogadishu, Livelihoods Adviser   2003 to 2006  Lilongwe, Livelihoods Adviser   2000 to 2002  Dhaka, Livelihoods Adviser   1998 to 1999   DFID, Natural Resources Adviser   Nov 1998  Joined DFID      Media enquiries     Email newsdesk@fcdo.gov.uk     Telephone 020 7008 3100    Email the FCDO Newsdesk (monitored 24 hours a day) in the first instance, and we will respond as soon as possible.   "
